title: VINSPIRE 6 Pcs Pink Artificial Gypsophila Flower, Realistic Mini Fake Flowers for Home Decor, Wedding Bouquets, Diy Floral Arrangements, for Birthdays, and Holiday Decorations
features: 【Quantity and size】Enhance your home decoration with these 28 cm tall pink flowers artificial bouquet, featuring 6 stems per pack. Each stem has 3 branches with approximately 30 small buds, perfect for wedding flowers decorations or DIY projects. UV-resistant and non-toxic, these decorative artificial flowers require no maintenance.

【Features】Create stunning wedding bouquets or baby breath flowers artificial arrangements with these versatile fake flowers. The pink artificial flowers mimic real gypsophila plants, adding a touch of elegance to any setting. Each flower head and stem is detachable for easy customization.

【Suitable for all styles】Ideal for bridal bouquets, baby shower decor, or French-inspired floral arrangements, these blush pink fake flowers offer a lifelike appearance. Use them for wreaths, centerpieces, or forget me not flowers themes. If you want full bouquet as same effects as in the picture, please purchase 2 pack or more.

【Durable】These artificial pink flowers are perfect for home decorations, offering a longer lifespan than real flowers. Great for baby breath artificial flowers arrangements, rose-inspired decor, or faux flowers displays. No watering needed, just effortless beauty.

【Multifunctional】Transform any space with these pink gypsophila artificial flowers, ideal for wedding decor, baby showers, or DIY projects. The realistic touch of these fake flower bouquets makes them a favorite for decorative artificial flowers lovers. Mix with white flowers for a charming contrast.
description: enhance your space with these stunning 28 cm tall pink artificial flowers, perfect for home decoration flowers and wedding flowers decorations. each pack includes 6 delicate pink stems, featuring 3 branches per flower cluster and approximately 30 small buds per bouquet. these uv-resistant and non-toxic gypsophila plants require no maintenance or watering, making them ideal for busy lifestyles. the flexible design allows each flower head and stem to be easily removed and reattached, perfect for diy projects like wreaths, bouquets, or french touch arrangements. whether for bridal bouquets, wedding parties, or home decor, these pink fake flowers add a blush of elegance to any setting. for a full bouquet like the one pictured, we recommend purchasing 2 or more packs. these decorative artificial flowers mimic the beauty of real forget me not flowers and baby's breath flowers artificial, offering a longer lifespan than fresh blooms. versatile for use in baby showers, baby breath artificial flowers, or as pink flowers artificial in vases, centerpieces, and more. their lifelike appearance blends seamlessly with other artificial rose flowers or faux flowers for a cohesive look. elevate your floral decor with these pink artificial flowers, a timeless choice for any occasion.
